Home.title: Soil that can no longer heal alone
Home.tagline: A medical diagnosis for Latin American soil
Home.subtitle: Satellite data + reports from rural communities

hero.title: The soil beneath your feet is trying to tell you something.
hero.subtitle: SoilMedic listens. Satellite data + your field observations = a real diagnosis for your land.
hero.subtext: No subscription. No credit card. Free forever.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Most apps look at the sky. Nobody looks down.
problem.paragraph1: Weather apps track rain and temperature. Satellites monitor forests and floods. But the soil — the living layer that feeds entire communities across Latin America — has no voice.
problem.paragraph2: In El Salvador alone, thousands of farming families watch their harvests fail without knowing why. The signs are there: pale soil, no earthworms, hard ground that water can't penetrate. But there's no tool to connect those signs to a real diagnosis.
problem.paragraph3: SoilMedic was built to change that. Combine what you see on the ground with what satellites see from space — and get a real answer in minutes.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to know your soil

step1.title: Pin your plot
step1.description: Tell us where your land is. Use GPS auto-detect or drop a pin on a map.

step2.title: Answer 4 quick questions
step2.description: What color is the soil? Does it smell? Are there earthworms? Is it hard or soft? No technical knowledge needed.

step3.title: Get your diagnosis
step3.description: We cross-reference your observations with satellite moisture data and give you a clear health report — plus exactly what to do.

diagnosis.label: The Diagnosis
diagnosis.title: Not data. A diagnosis.
diagnosis.subtitle: We translate satellite numbers into plain language — and tell you exactly what to do.

card1.label: Moisture by Layer
card1.title: Understand what's happening below
card1.description: GAIA breaks down soil moisture at every depth, showing you exactly where water is (and isn't).

card2.label: Smart Translation
card2.title: From raw data to next steps
card2.description: Satellite numbers mean nothing without context. We convert them into decisions you can act on today.

card3.label: Real-time Alerts
card3.title: Never miss a critical moment
card3.description: When your soil needs immediate attention, GAIA flags it instantly and tells you exactly what to do this week.

access.label: Access
access.title: Free. For everyone. Always.
access.paragraph1: SoilMedic was built for farming communities, not corporations. There are no tiers, no paywalls, no premium features locked behind a subscription. If you have a plot of land and a phone, you have access.
access.paragraph2: If SoilMedic has helped you and you'd like to help keep it running, a small contribution goes a long way. But it's completely optional — and it never changes what you can access.
access.smallPrint: Your contribution helps cover satellite API costs and server infrastructure.

footer.tagline: GAIA · Built for the land · El Salvador & LATAM · 2026
